meaning: remembrance/mention (as the subject of this verse)
Zakariya (a proper name meaning 'God has remembered')
the bone (subject of وَهَنَ - became weak)
and it became intensely lit up (describes الرَّأْسُ - the head)
with grey hair (describing الرَّأْسُ - the head)
I am/exist (after لَمْ which makes it negative past)
utterly miserable (describing how he was with دُعَآئِكَ/your calling)
I feared (referring to Prophet Zakariya expressing his concern)
the protectors (who Zakariya feared would mishandle inheritance after him)
and she was/existed (referring to امْرَأَتِى - my wife)
barren (describes my wife in وَكَانَتِ ٱمْرَأَتِى)
so grant! (to Zakariya asking Allah for a child)
to/for me (connected to فَهَبْ - so grant)
Jacob (as the object being inherited from)
very pleasing (as a quality of something/someone)
Indeed we (subject of نُبَشِّرُكَ - 'we give good news')
we make (referring to Allah in this ayah)
he becomes/will be (questioning how غُلٰمٌ/a son could exist)
for me, to me (connected to يَكُونُ - will be)
and she was (connecting to previous statement about having a son)
and indeed/and already (emphasizes the verb بَلَغْتُ)
extremely advanced in age (describing بَلَغْتُ - I have reached)
like that (referring to what was just said in قَالَ)
upon me (referring to creating something, as mentioned by اللَّهِ)
surely for me (asking for a sign from اللَّهِ)
your sign (referring to the miracle given to Zechariah)
that not (subject of تُكَلِّمَ - you speak)
that you speak (in the context of أَلَّا تُكَلِّمَ - that you will not speak)
the people (being acted upon by تُكَلِّمَ - you speak to)

from (connects to ٱلْمِحْرَابِ - the prayer niche)
then he revealed/inspired (to قَوْمِهِ - his people)
to them (who he signaled to in فَأَوْحَىٰٓ)
O Yahya! (calling out to Prophet Yahya)
take! (command to one male) (connected to الْكِتٰبَ)
and tender compassion (as a divine gift)
to/towards his two parents (object of بَرًّا)
a tyrant (object of يَكُن - was not)
and peace (connected to what came before)
he was born (on the day mentioned in يَوْمَ)
and mention! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
Mary (as the subject being mentioned in ٱذْكُرْ)

a place (object of انتبذت - she withdrew to)

a human being (object of فَتَمَثَّلَ - appeared as)
in perfect human form (describing how رُوحَنَا appeared)
she said (subject of إِنِّىٓ أَعُوذُ - 'Indeed I seek refuge')
by The Most Merciful (object of أَعُوذُ - I seek refuge)
from you (object of أَعُوذُ - I seek refuge)
righteous, pious (describing someone in the ayah)
so that I may give as a gift (to لَكِ - to you)
a boy (object of لِأَهَبَ - to give)
a pure and blessed one (describing غُلٰمًا/child)
he is/will be (describing how غُلٰمٌ could exist)
a boy (subject of يَكُونُ - will be)
he touches me (in response to أَنَّىٰ يَكُونُ لِى غُلٰمٌ)
an unchaste woman (object of أَكُ in أَكُنْ)
like that (addressing a female) (subject of قَالَ)
your Lord (feminine, subject of قَالَ - He said)
and so that we make him
a sign, a miracle (object of لِنَجْعَلَهُ)
and he was (connected to هُوَ عَلَىَّ هَيِّنٌ - it is easy for Me)

with him (referring to the pregnancy/conception mentioned in فَحَمَلَتْهُ)

to/towards the palm tree (connected to إِلَىٰ)

a forgotten thing (object of وَكُنتُ - I was)

fresh ripe dates (that will fall upon you)

of the human beings (object of مِنَ - from)

so/then never (will I speak to anyone today)
her people (object of أَتَتْ - she came to)

a thing (object of جِئْتِ - you have brought)
an extremely fabricated thing (object of جِئْتِ)
Aaron (being addressed as 'O sister of Aaron')
an evil/bad thing (describing أَبُوكِ - your father)
to him (the one they're pointing to)
they said (responding to إِلَيْهِ - to him)

he was (describing مَن who was صَبِيًّا)

a child (object of كَيْفَ نُكَلِّمُ - how can we speak to)

and the obligatory charity (object of أَوْصٰنِى)
and very good and kind (to my mother)
he makes me (in the context of وَلَمْ يَجْعَلْنِى - 'and He did not make me')

upon me (connected to وَٱلسَّلٰمُ - and peace)

alive (describing the state of عَلَىَّ 'upon me')
son (of مَرْيَمَ, subject of the sentence)
Mary (object of عِيسَى ٱبْنُ - Jesus son of Mary)
who/which/that (connects 'Isa son of Mary' to what follows)

that (connects 'it was not for Allah' to 'He should take')
a child/son (object of يَتَّخِذَ - to take)

Allah (the one true God who is being worshipped)

between them (referring to the differing groups mentioned in فَٱخْتَلَفَ ٱلْأَحْزَابُ)

from (connecting بَيْنِهِمْ to what comes after)

with them (connected to أَسْمِعْ - how well they will hear)

on the day (when they come to us)

the day (object of يَأْتُونَنَا - they come to us)

of the deep regret (possessed by يَوْمَ/day)
when (referring to يَوْمَ ٱلْحَسْرَةِ - Day of Regret)
